name: claude-hooks-type-vocabulary
tags: issue_type, task type, body type, vocabulary, feedback, jira hierarchy
body:
Two DIFFERENT type vocabularies in the task system — easy to confuse:

- body `Type:` ∈ {feature, bug, research, misc, epic} — workflow kind, controls required body sections.
- `issue_type` param ∈ {epic, story, task, bug, subtask, feedback} — DB hierarchy (verified against _ISSUE_TYPES in src/tools/tasks.py).

`issue_type='task'` or `'story'` REQUIRES a parent (JiraHierarchyGate) — a standalone/root task must use `issue_type='epic'`. `issue_type='subtask'` requires a parent of type {bug, story, task} — not epic. `issue_type='feedback'` is created via tasks__create_feedback, always parented to a finished task.

**Correction (2026-07-05):** added missing 'feedback' to the issue_type set — previous version listed only {bug, epic, story, subtask, task}, verified incomplete against _ISSUE_TYPES in code.
